completed_work.name: Analyze codebase and treatment architecture
completed_work.details: Reviewed Vue 3 frontend, NestJS backend, TypeORM entities. Confirmed Treatment has patientId and staffAssignments relation.

completed_work.details: Added addStaffAssignment, getStaffAssignments, removeStaffAssignment, updateStaffAssignment methods

completed_work.name: Update frontend TreatmentForm UI component
completed_work.details: Added employee multi-select dropdown and role configuration panel

completed_work.name: Fix TypeScript compilation errors
completed_work.details: Resolved union type issues in TreatmentForm.vue; both frontend and backend compile cleanly

remaining_work.description: Run npm run test:unit to verify treatment/staff assignment logic
Test complete workflow: create treatment → select patient → select template → select employees → verify data persistence
Confirm staff assignments are correctly stored in treatment_staff_assignments table
Test bidirectional updates and treatment detail view

human_actions_pending.context: Verify form submission and data persistence before proceeding to full integration

infrastructure_state.build_status: both frontend and backend compile successfully

decisions.decision: One treatment ↔ one patient, one treatment ↔ many employees
decisions.rationale: Per requirements; implemented via TreatmentStaffAssignment join table

decisions.decision: Employee selection at treatment creation time
decisions.rationale: Simplest UX; avoids separate step; can be extended for post-creation management
Avoided TypeScript union type complexity; payload includes both IDs (for form) and objects (for backend)
Flexibility for custom roles; can be enum-constrained later if needed

next_action: Run unit tests and E2E browser tests to validate data persistence and form submission flow
